qualityNotes: The reviewed-app launch seam stays narrow: launch-reviewed-app uses the bridge runtime while artifact preview remains on the separate render-html-preview capability.
Host-owned persistence and degraded recovery are normalized before rendering, which prevents reviewed launches from collapsing back into synthetic seeded shells.
No src/renderer/packages/initial_data.ts refresh was needed because CB-305 changes runtime wiring and proof coverage, not the seeded example dataset.
